headline: Global High Barrier Packaging Films Market Forecast 2026 to 2036 | Asia Pacific Leads as Amcor & Berry Global Expand
summary: According to Future Market Insights (FMI), the global high barrier packaging films market is entering a sustained growth phase, underpinned by rising demand for extended shelf life, product protection, and efficient distribution systems across food, pharmaceutical, and consumer goods industries. The market is valued at USD 15.7 billion in 2026 and is projected to reach USD 30.9 billion by 2036, expanding at a CAGR of 7.0% over the forecast period.
